from fastapi import FastAPI
import importlib

app = FastAPI()

PLUGIN_MODULES = {}
REPORT_MODULES = {}


@app.on_event("startup")
async def load_plugins():
    for name in ["auth", "analytics", "notifications"]:
        PLUGIN_MODULES[name] = importlib.import_module(f"plugins.{name}")
    for name in ["monthly", "weekly", "daily"]:
        REPORT_MODULES[name] = importlib.import_module(f"reports.{name}")


@app.get("/plugins/{plugin_name}")
async def run_plugin(plugin_name: str):
    module = PLUGIN_MODULES[plugin_name]
    return module.execute()


@app.get("/reports/{report_type}")
async def generate_report(report_type: str):
    mod = REPORT_MODULES[report_type]
    data = mod.generate()
    return {"report": report_type, "data": data}
